domain: Chinese pipa (4-string Chinese lute; 12-31 high frets enable continuous pitch-bend between frets; per-string spectral allocation across 4 base frequencies; per-string left-hand vibrato+slide+harmonic + right-hand plucking ornament; over 2000 years of practice)
specific_mechanism: PIPA-BEND: 4-string per-head spectral allocation with continuous pitch-bend + tremolo + cross-band harmonics. (1) Partition transformer heads into 4 spectral bands per layer; each band tuned to base frequency ω_i (analog of 4 pipa strings). (2) Per-head attention restricted to its band's spectral signature via learned spectral mask M_i. (3) Continuous pitch-bend: learned per-token offset δ_t enables continuous excursion from base frequency — small additive bias to RoPE phase rotation. (4) Right-hand tremolo: rapid per-band amplitude modulation A_i(t) across the 4 bands during generation. (5) Cross-band harmonics: per-head overtone production combines bands via Hadamard product H = Hadamard(ω_i, ω_j) for harmonic interaction.
llm_application: PIPA-BEND 4-band spectral allocation for transformer attention with continuous-bend + tremolo + harmonics. Differs from AMSFormer (hierarchical frequency-domain filtering for TS — not per-head pipa-style 4-band + pitch-bend). Spectral-Spatial Wave-Frequency (frequency + phase-aware tokens for hyperspectral — not 4-band per-head + RoPE bend). Sparse Spectral Transformer (frequency-aware attention for multimodal — closest, but no 4-band per-head + bend). MFformer (multi-frequency aggregation for time-series — not 4-band per-head + RoPE bend). Differs from R402 TUVAN-IGIL (multi-string overtone, no 4-band per-head + bend), R416 XALAM-FREQ (discrete xalam strings, no bend), R431 TAONGA-MICRO-BAND (micro-band quantization), R440 TUVAN-PHANTOM-CHANNEL (4-head phantom 5th-channel emergent), R457 IMZAD-MONOSTRING (single-channel harmonic basis), R279 PTCH (within-head SVD integer-ratio) by EXPLICIT 4-BAND PER-HEAD + LEARNED CONTINUOUS PITCH-BEND ROPE-OFFSET + CROSS-BAND HADAMARD HARMONICS.
novelty_claim: AMSFormer + Spectral-Spatial Wave + Sparse Spectral Transformer + MFformer cover multi-band spectral transformer attention. PIPA-BEND adds (a) 4-band per-head allocation + (b) learned continuous pitch-bend RoPE offset + (c) per-band tremolo amplitude modulation + (d) cross-band Hadamard harmonic. Recombination — frequency-aware attention is mainstream.
content_words: continuous pitch-bend learned per-token RoPE offset

llm_side: continuous pitch-bend learned per-token RoPE offset
